sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Iron

Brand: Gyeon

Available: In Stock

Price: £14.50

Variants:
- 500ml £14.50
- 1000ml £25.00
- 4000ml £83.00

Product Images:
https://www.in2detailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/image246441549_2048x2048.jpg?v=1623328667
https://www.in2detailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/image246441551_2048x2048.jpg?v=1623328670
https://www.in2detailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/products/image246441557_2048x2048.jpg?v=1623328673

Description:
Gyeon Q2M Iron is a pH-neutral iron remover, capable of dissolving iron fallout from your brakes, the road and other environmental and industrial sources. Use it on wheels, paint, glass and trim. Q2M Iron is one of the most efficient, fast-reacting iron removers on the market. This product was specially developed to decontaminate surfaces from harsh ferrous deposits, making intensive cleansing simple for both enthusiasts and pro-detailers alike. The strong colour-changing effect of the iron contaminants present is a very accurate indicator of how much pollution has accumulated on your wheels, paint, glass and trim. Q2M Iron will show you if a reaction is taking place, which is reassuring to know that you're successfully removing iron contaminants. Owing to its neutral pH, Q2M Iron does not do any harm to door seals or convertible tops, so if you manage to get 'overspray' on these areas, they can simply be rinsed with no effect.

Key Features:
- Efficiently removes iron fallout contaminants
- Stays longer and dries slower due to the gel-based formula
- Fast-acting, reducing application time
- Safe for all surfaces due to its neutral pH
- Highly reactive
- Strong colouring effect
- 100% ready-to-use formula - spray, allow to react, rinse

Application Advice:
- Q2M Iron is a strong degreasing agent and iron remover suitable for paint, glass, wheels and trim.
- When using, it's best to wear protective gloves.

Precautions:
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Seek medical attention if swallowed.

Customer Reviews (Based on 3 reviews):

Kiran Chavda: "Great product" - Easy to use and the guys at in2 are top lads thanks again

Guv Matharu: Gyeon Q2M Iron

Rajnikant Patel: "R8 Detail" - This was awesome, paintwork was super smooth

Q2M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED

Category: Exterior / maintenance

Strong and effective dedicated wheel cleaner

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED is a dedicated wheel cleaner designed to remove grime, dirt and brake dust from all types of wheels and finishes. Its gel based formula clings strongly to the surface, allowing effective cleaning while remaining safe for coated and uncoated rims.

Product Image:
https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_iron-wheel-cleaner_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png

Effective wheel cleaner with increased brake dust removal functionality.

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED combines strong wheel cleaning power with the ability to remove ferrous contamination. It simplifies wheel maintenance by dissolving brake dust and embedded particles without damaging delicate finishes.

Benefits:
- LOW ODOUR
- INSTANT ACTION
- SUITABLE FOR ALL WHEELS

What makes Q2M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED so special?
- Removes brake dust and heavy wheel contamination
- Gel formula clings to surfaces for effective cleaning

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
- Capacities: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
- pH Level: NEUTRAL
- Consumption: 100ml/car

HOW TO USE:
1. Spray Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED onto cool wheels.
2. Allow the product to dwell and react with contamination.
3. Agitate gently with a brush if needed.
4. Rinse thoroughly with water.
5. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Q: Is Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED safe for ceramic coated wheels?
A: Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated wheels.

Q: Does it remove iron contamination?
A: Yes. It removes ferrous deposits while cleaning wheels.

Q: Can it be used on all wheel finishes?
A: Yes. It is safe for all common wheel types.

Q: Does it need agitation?
A: Light agitation helps with heavy contamination.

Q: Is it suitable for regular maintenance?
A: Yes. It is suitable for routine wheel cleaning.

Description:
STRONG AND EFFECTIVE DEDICATED WHEEL CLEANER. Dedicated & highly effective cleaner for all types of wheels and finishes. A powerful formula redefined to remove efficiently grime, dirt and brake dust.

SAFE & EFFICIENT: The Q2M Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined has a gel consistency, clings to the surface extremely well and both loosens and dissolves dirt particles. The IRON in its name stands for a great ability to remove ferrous deposits without losing the typical wheel cleaner character of the product. A powerful cleaner, yet safe on all types of rims and finishes, coated or not. Its formula makes it an ideal solution to clean and maintain wheels without any risk of damaging their finish.

REDEFINED: We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we've taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We've reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We're committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

https://www.justcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/1000-iron-wheel-cleaner-1500.jpg?v=1760010390

https://www.justcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/E.-IronWheelCleaner-3-scaled.webp?v=1760010528
https://www.justcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/F.-IronWheelCleaner-2-scaled.webp?v=1760010528
https://www.justcarcare.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/A.-IronWheelCleaner-2-scaled.webp?v=1760010528

A dedicated and highly effective wheel cleaner that removes dirt, grime and iron fallout from your alloy wheels.

Key Benefits:
- RTU - Ready to use formula, no dilution required
- Powerful Fallout Remover - Dissolves brake dust, ferrous deposit and road grime
- Safe to Use - pH balanced formula suitable for painted, polished, chrome or powder coated wheels

Description:
Its powerful gel formula clings exceptionally well to surfaces, efficiently loosening and dissolving grime, dirt, and brake dust, while eliminating ferrous deposits.

Unlike the strong, unpleasant smells of the previous version and most iron wheel cleaners, our new formula boasts a much more subtle scent resembling banana. Enjoy a more pleasant cleaning experience without the overpowering rotten egg smell.

The “IRON” in its name highlights its remarkable ability to eliminate ferrous deposits while preserving its efficiency as a traditional wheel cleaner.

This advanced formula ensures that even the most stubborn contaminants are removed, restoring your wheels to their original look.

Despite its robust cleaning power, Q²M Iron WheelCleaner Redefined is safe for all types of rims and finishes, whether coated or not. Its formula makes it an ideal solution for cleaning and maintaining wheels without any risk of damaging their finish.

How to use Gyeon Q²M Iron Wheel Cleaner Redefined:
- Use on a cool wheel and out direct sunlight
- Spray liberally onto the wheels finish
- Let dwell for 1-2 minutes
- Agitate with a wheel brush if needed
- Rinse the wheel thoroughly
